Who We Are

Norwegian Heritage. Asian Reach. Engineering Discipline.

Norwest Asia is the Asian operating arm of Norwest Marine Service AS, a Norwegian marine and industrial engineering company established in Avaldsnes, Western Norway. Through our affiliation with the Norway-based head office, we serve as the official QuantiParts distributor for the Asian region — part of a global network specializing in genuine and OEM-equivalent spare parts for legacy and medium-speed diesel engines.

Our parent company holds a Delphi/Experian credit score of 897/1000 and is ISPS certified by the Norwegian Coastal Administration (Kystverket) for port facility security compliance — credentials that reflect operational discipline and financial reliability.

All commercial transactions, quotations, and invoicing are administered directly by Norwest Asia. Company Registration: 202603033065 (003820257-K).

What Sets Us Apart

  • Official QuantiParts distributor with direct access to genuine & OEM legacy parts networks in Norway and the Netherlands
  • Specialists in discontinued, obsolete, and hard-to-find components — our signature capability
  • Full material certification and genuine provenance documentation on every part
  • Technical cross-referencing from engine serial numbers, photographs, or dimensional data
  • Globally deployable engineering teams for on-site troubleshooting and overhaul supervision
  • Flexible supply models — from single critical spares to complete overhaul support packages
What We Do

Five Core Capabilities

We do not hold a static product catalogue — the range is too vast. Instead, we maintain a comprehensive brand and platform reference, and we identify the exact part you need from your engine data, OEM number, or dimensional specification.

01

Genuine & OEM-Equivalent Spare Parts Supply

We source and deliver critical spare parts for medium-speed and heavy-duty engines across marine, power generation, mining, construction, and industrial sectors worldwide.

  • Cylinder liners, piston crowns, piston rings, connecting rods
  • Main bearings, conrod bearings, thrust bearings, camshaft bearings
  • Fuel injection pumps, injectors, nozzles, high-pressure pipes
  • Cylinder heads, valve seats, valve guides, valve springs, rotators
  • Gasket sets (top/bottom), O-rings, lip seals, manifold gaskets
  • Lube oil pumps, fuel transfer pumps, cooling water pumps, bilge pumps
  • Complete overhaul kits (partial or full)
  • Filtration systems — lube oil, fuel, air intake, hydraulic
  • Separator components (Westfalia, Alfa Laval)
  • Turbocharger cartridges, compressor wheels, nozzle rings
  • Ignition coils, spark plugs, pre-chamber components (gas engines)
  • Hydraulic pumps, motors, cylinders, seals, and control valves
02

Technical Cross-Referencing & Parts Identification

Engine serial number worn? Nameplate missing? Part number obsolete? Our engineering team identifies the correct replacement from multiple data sources.

  • Engine nameplate data and serial numbers
  • Photographs, dimensional measurements, and sample analysis
  • OEM technical drawings and microfiche archives
  • Reverse engineering for obsolete components
  • Cross-reference to modern equivalents
03

On-Site Technical Support & Engineering Deployment

Our engineering teams are globally deployable at short notice for troubleshooting, commissioning, overhaul supervision, and training.

  • On-site troubleshooting and fault diagnosis
  • Commissioning of new engines and auxiliary systems
  • Supervision of major overhauls and rebuilds
  • Condition assessment and maintenance planning
  • Technical advisory for fleet-wide parts consolidation
04

Obsolete, Hard-to-Source & Legacy Part Solutions

Primary dealers discontinued support? OEM no longer stocks the part? This is our signature capability: solving the problems others abandon.

  • Specialist sourcing through European network
  • Remanufacturing partners and OEM-equivalent suppliers
  • Reverse engineering and custom manufacturing
  • Full certification and traceability documentation
05

Procurement Outsourcing & MRO Integration

For clients with fragmented procurement across multiple sites and engine types, we become your single point of contact.

  • Annual MRO parts forecasting
  • Sourcing and consolidated delivery
  • Inventory management and consignment stock
  • Framework agreements with fixed pricing
  • Monthly reporting and consumption analytics
Engine Brands & Platforms

Comprehensive Brand Authority Reference

The following represents the engine manufacturers and specific platforms for which Norwest Asia supplies genuine and OEM-equivalent spare parts, technical support, and overhaul solutions. For any specific part enquiry, we cross-reference against OEM part numbers, engine serial numbers, or dimensional data.

Wärtsilä

Finland
  • Vasa 32, Vasa 46 (all variants)
  • 50DF, 34SG / 34DF
  • L20, L26 medium-speed diesel
  • 20V / 32V / 46V V-engine configs
  • Auxiliary engines and gensets
  • Wärtsilä-Sulzer legacy components

MAN B&W / MAN Energy Solutions

Germany / Denmark
  • L16/24, L21/31, L27/38, L32/40
  • 32/40, 48/60, 51/60DF
  • S26MC–S50MC, L35MC–L70MC (2-stroke legacy)
  • K98MC, K90MC, K80MC
  • Alpha lubrication systems
  • TCA / TCR turbochargers

Caterpillar / MAK

USA / Germany
  • MAK M20, M25, M32, M43, M46, M551
  • Cat 3406, 3408, 3412, 3508, 3512, 3516, 3520
  • Cat C32, C280, G3600 series
  • Legacy D399, D398
  • Mining & construction genset engines

INNIO Jenbacher

Austria — formerly GE
  • Type 2: J208, J212, J216, J220
  • Type 3: J312, J316, J320, J324
  • Type 4: J412, J416, J420, J424
  • Type 6: J612, J616, J620, J624
  • Type 9: J920 FleXtra
  • Ignition, pre-chambers, spark plugs, controls

SEMT Pielstick

France — now MAN Energy Solutions
  • PC2-5, PC2-6
  • PA4-200, PA6-280, PA6-320
  • PC4-570
  • Legacy PA and PC series
  • Cross-reference to MAN equivalents

Bergen

Norway — Rolls-Royce / Kongsberg
  • B32:40, B33:45, B35:40
  • C25:33, C26:33
  • K / KV series (legacy)
  • B36:45V, B36:45L (gas)
  • Auxiliary and genset applications

Niigata

Japan
  • 6L16HX, 6L21/31, 6L25/31
  • 6M26.3, 6M31.4
  • 8L21/31, 8L25/31
  • 12V16/24, 16V16/24
  • 6M28BG, 8M28BG (gas variants)

Yanmar

Japan
  • 6EY18, 6EY26, 6EY33
  • 6N18, 6N21, 6N26, 6N330
  • 6GL-HT, 6GL-UT
  • M200, M220 series
  • T240, T260, T280

Mitsubishi Heavy Industries

Japan
  • S6A2, S6A3, S6R, S6R2, S12A2, S12R, S16R
  • S6B3, S6B, S12B
  • UEC45, UEC52, UEC60, UEC75, UEC85
  • LSE / LSE-Eco series (low-speed)

Daihatsu

Japan
  • DK-20, DK-28, DK-36
  • DL-16, DL-19, DL-22, DL-26, DL-28, DL-32
  • DS-18, DS-22, DS-26, DS-28, DS-32
  • DC-17, DC-32, DE-18, DE-23, DE-28
  • 6DE-18, 6DE-23, 6DE-28

Deutz MWM / Cat Energy Solutions

Germany
  • TCG 2015 (V8, V12, V16, V20)
  • TCG 2020 (V12, V16, V20)
  • TCG 2032 (V12, V16)
  • TBG 604, TBG 620, TBG 632
  • Legacy 234, 604, 620 series
  • Biogas & natural gas applications

Stork Werkspoor

Netherlands — legacy
  • TM410, TM620
  • RHO 216, RHO 228, RHO 330
  • SW280, SW360, SW400
  • Obsolete part solutions & remanufacturing

Sulzer

Switzerland — legacy, now Wärtsilä
  • ZA40S, ZA50S (medium-speed)
  • RTA48, RTA52, RTA58, RTA62, RTA72, RTA84, RTA96
  • RND68, RND76, RND90 (legacy)
  • Cross-reference to Wärtsilä-Sulzer equivalents

Ruston

UK — legacy, now MAN Energy Solutions
  • RK270, RK280, RK215
  • AP230, AP200
  • Obsolete part sourcing & remanufacturing
  • Cross-reference to MAN equivalents

Mirrlees Blackstone

UK — legacy
  • ESL16, ESL25, ESL36, ESL40, ESL48, ESL56
  • MB275, MB430
  • K Major, ESL Major series
  • Reverse engineering & remanufacturing

ABC — Anglo Belgian Corporation

Belgium
  • DZC (medium-speed diesel)
  • DZ (gas / dual-fuel variants)
  • Auxiliary engine components
  • Marine and industrial applications

Cummins

USA — Construction, Mining, Power Gen
  • KTA19, KTA38, KTA50 (industrial)
  • QSK19, QSK38, QSK45, QSK60, QSK78 (mining)
  • QST30, QSX15 (construction)

Komatsu

Japan — Mining & Heavy Equipment
  • SAA6D170, SAA12V170 (haul truck)
  • SAA6D140, SAA6D125 (excavator)
  • HD785, HD1500 haul truck engines

Volvo Penta

Sweden — Marine & Industrial
  • D13, D16 (marine/industrial)
  • TAD134, TAD164, TAD165 (genset)
  • IPS components
  • Marine genset & auxiliary applications

Parker Kittiwake

UK — Condition Monitoring
  • Lube oil analysis kits and reagents
  • Ferrography and particle counting
  • On-site testing equipment & calibration
  • Condition monitoring program support
Sectors & Applications

Five Sectors. One Standard.

From offshore platforms to mining haul trucks, we support mission-critical engine operations across Asia's most demanding industries.

Marine & Offshore

Main propulsion, auxiliary engines, offshore support vessels, dredging fleets, tugboats, fishing vessels, and yacht systems. Separator systems, turbochargers, hydraulics, and ballast water treatment.

  • Cargo vessels, tankers, bulk carriers, LNG carriers
  • PSVs, AHTS, crew boats, platform supply
  • Alfa Laval & Westfalia separators and purifiers
  • Emergency sourcing for breakdown situations

Power Generation

Biogas power plants, CCGT auxiliary engines, solar/wind farm construction gensets, CHP systems, grid stability, and emergency backup for utilities.

  • Jenbacher, Cat, MWM biogas gensets
  • Gas engine ignition, spark plugs, pre-chambers
  • BESS auxiliary cooling and power
  • 24/7 operations support for hydrometallurgy

Mining & Heavy Industry

Open-cut haul truck fleets, underground rail haulage, processing plant power generation, smelter auxiliary engines, and remote site logistics.

  • Cat 797, Komatsu 930E haul trucks
  • Wärtsilä, Cat, MAN processing plant gensets
  • Legacy fleet obsolete part solutions
  • Fleet-wide parts consolidation & condition monitoring

Construction & Infrastructure

Mega-project construction gensets, crane and lifting equipment, heavy transport fleet, concrete batching plants, TBM auxiliary power, and road construction equipment.

  • Build-phase power supply for mega-projects
  • Trucks, bulldozers, graders, compactors
  • Piling rig and foundation equipment engines
  • On-site technical support and remote logistics

Rail & Transport

Underground mining rail haulage diesel engines, port prime mover fleets, rail maintenance-of-way equipment, locomotive auxiliary power units, and legacy rail engine platform support.

  • Terminal tractors, RTGs, straddle carriers
  • Tampers, ballast regulators, rail grinding machines
  • Locomotive auxiliary gensets
  • Obsolete parts for legacy rail platforms
Why Clients Choose Us

The Norwest Asia Difference

We do not claim to be a one-stop supermarket. We are a specialized sourcing and technical support partner for organisations that operate medium-speed, legacy, and heavy-duty engine platforms where reliability, traceability, and engineering competence matter.

Official QuantiParts Distributor

Direct access to genuine & OEM legacy parts networks in Norway and the Netherlands, with full traceability on every component.

European Supply Heritage

Parts sourced through established technical partners with full material certification and genuine provenance documentation.

Legacy & Obsolete Specialization

Support for engines no longer in production — where others cannot source, we find, certify, and deliver.

Flexible Supply Models

From single critical spares to complete overhaul support packages, tailored to your operational urgency.

Transparent Commercial Terms

Industry-aligned pricing with clear lead-time communication and no-obligation commercial benchmarks on request.

Responsive Regional Support

Asian-based coordination with Norwegian engineering backing — globally deployable technical teams at short notice.

Our Approach

We work best as a strategic secondary channel — enhancing your procurement framework with flexibility, cost competitiveness, and responsive support when primary suppliers face long lead times, stock shortages, or discontinuation.

  • Rapid technical confirmation and cross-referencing
  • Transparent pricing with full material certification
  • Realistic lead-time commitments
  • No-obligation commercial benchmarks on request
Get in Touch

Let's Solve Your Engine Parts Challenge

Discuss your engine parts requirements with our technical team. We provide quotations, parts identification, and logistics coordination across Asia.
